description.from: Deals 361*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+277.6% of Attack Power damage to enemies within range and stuns them for 2sec.
description.to: Deals 361*(1+0.3Skill Level)+277.6% of Attack Power damage to enemies within range and stuns them for 3 sec.

description.from: Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for 15sec, dealing 9*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+6.9% of Attack Power Magic DoT every second and reducing Magic Defense by 10%. If recast within 15sec, the Magic Defense reduction is increased by 50%, stacking up to 5times.This increase effect cannot be dispelled.
description.to: Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for 15 sec, dealing 9(1+0.3Skill Level)+6.9% of Attack Power continuous Magic Damage. Enemies with [Mark of Death] take 25% increased Magic Damage, and if recast within 15 sec, the effect is increased by 20%. This effect stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Deals 127*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+97.6% of Attack Power as Magic Damage every second to all enemies for 14 sec, and recovers HP equal to 75% of damage dealt. During the duration, all allies take 10% reduced Physical Damage, and enemies affected by [Mark of Death] take additional Magic Damage equal to 97.6% of Attack Power.
description.to:
Deals 127(1+0.3Skill Level)+97.6% of Attack Power Magic Damage per second to all enemies for 12 sec, recovers HP equal to 130% of damage dealt, and has a 10% chance to stun them for 0.6 sec.
During the duration, all allies take 20% reduced Physical Damage, and enemies with [Mark of Death] take additional Magic Damage equal to 97.6% of Attack Power.

description.from: Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 55*(1+0.3*Skill Level). When taking damage that would be fatal, enters [Coffin] state for 5sec, restoring 197*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+153.7% of Attack Power + 10% of Max HP. [Coffin]:Attack Speed changes do not affect the target. The target is immune to all damage and deals Magic Damage equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every 1sec.
description.to:
Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by 45(1+0.3Skill Level).
When taking damage that would be fatal, enters [Coffin] state for 5 sec, restoring 197(1+0.3Skill Level)+153.7% of Attack Power + 6% of Max HP.
While in [Coffin] state, Attack Speed changes do not affect you, you are immune to all damage, and deal Magic Damage equal to 5% of Max HP per second to nearby enemies.

dark.from: Mana cost increases by 2000, but pulls the target toward you.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but pulls the target to your vicinity with a 100% success rate.

dark.from: All allies additionally take 10% less Physical DMG.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 7 sec.

dark.from: When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for 1 sec.
dark.to: When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for 1.2 sec.

description.from: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target’s CC Resist by 320 and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.
description.to: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target’s CC Resist by 400 and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.

dark.from: On hit, Attack and Healing increase by 1%. This effect stacks up to 35 times.
dark.to: On hit, Attack and Healing are increased by 1%. This effect stacks up to 50 times.

description.from: Deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power per second to nearby enemies, reduces their Attack by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to 100% of damage dealt.
description.to:
Deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power per second to nearby enemies, reduces their Attack by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to 75% of damage dealt.
The 4 allies with the highest Attack (excluding yourself) deal {2}% increased damage to non-hero enemies. This effect cannot be dispelled.
